sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58839" key="kompologi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κομπο-λογία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n58839.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boastful speaking</tr_>, Men.Prot.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.17D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.17D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
